reason_for_decision: The article is clear, technically responsible, and strong enough to pass as a Foundation entry on pulse-Doppler radar without revision.
strengths: The article gives beginners a useful mental model by separating pulse-based ranging from Doppler-based motion measurement.
The clutter section explains why pulse-Doppler matters operationally instead of stopping at a narrow definition.
The limitations section correctly explains radial velocity and prevents overclaiming about what the radar can infer by itself.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically grounded, and decision-useful enough to pass without revision.
